prompt: Which are the 15 most popular courses by total enrollment?

inputData.question: Which are the 15 most popular courses by total enrollment?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Which are the 15 most popular courses by total enrollment?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Which are the 15 most popular courses by total enrollment?"},"startedAt":1771855890807,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"To find the 15 most popular courses by total enrollment, I need to:
1. Join courses with course_sections (one course can have multiple sections)
2. Join course_sections with enrollments (each section can have multiple enrollments)
3. Count total enrollments per course
4. Order by enrollment count descending
5. Limit to top 15

The schema shows:
- courses table has id, code, name
- course_sections has course_id and links to enrollments
- enrollments has course_section_id

I'll aggregate enrollments by course and rank them by total enrollment count.","sql":"SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.code,
  c.name,
  COUNT(e.id) AS total_enrollment
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY total_enrollment DESC
LIMIT 15","assumptions":["Enrollment popularity is measured by counting all enrollment records across all sections of a course","Only active and inactive enrollments are counted (no filtering by is_active status)","A course can have multiple sections across different semesters/years, and we aggregate all enrollments across all sections"]},"endedAt":1771855926641},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"SELECT

GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY total_enrollment DESC
LIMIT 15"},"startedAt":1771855926644,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"SELECT

visualization.title: Top 15 Most Popular Courses by Total Enrollment

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.code,
  c.name,
  COUNT(e.id) AS total_enrollment
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY total_enrollment DESC
LIMIT 15

visualization.title: Top 15 Most Popular Courses by Total Enrollment

result.sql:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.code,
  c.name,
  COUNT(e.id) AS total_enrollment
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY total_enrollment DESC
LIMIT 15
